item.title: Super Load Stuck on the Route
item.description: A complex transport job involving a large and heavy load that requires precision and planning. What’s the biggest challenge in super load moves?

media:content.media:title: Super Load Stuck on the Route
media:content.media:description: A complex transport job involving a large and heavy load that requires precision and planning. What’s the biggest challenge in super load moves?

item.title: This isn’t going to be hard… or is it?
item.description: A recovery that looks simple at first glance quickly becomes more complex than expected. What challenges appear once work begins?

media:content.media:title: This isn’t going to be hard… or is it?
media:content.media:description: A recovery that looks simple at first glance quickly becomes more complex than expected. What challenges appear once work begins?

item.title: Tying It Up Safely
item.description: A focus on properly tying down and securing equipment for transport. Why is load security so important in heavy hauling?

media:content.media:title: Tying It Up Safely
media:content.media:description: A focus on properly tying down and securing equipment for transport. Why is load security so important in heavy hauling?

item.title: Another Mississippi River Mishap
item.description: A recovery operation near the Mississippi River requiring careful coordination and planning. What makes river-area recoveries more challenging?

media:content.media:title: Another Mississippi River Mishap
media:content.media:description: A recovery operation near the Mississippi River requiring careful coordination and planning. What makes river-area recoveries more challenging?

item.title: Guiding a Navigator back to safety
item.description: A stuck vehicle is carefully recovered and guided back to stable ground. How do operators maintain control during recovery?

media:content.media:title: Guiding a Navigator back to safety
media:content.media:description: A stuck vehicle is carefully recovered and guided back to stable ground. How do operators maintain control during recovery?

item.title: Old School Meets New School
item.description: A towing and recovery job combining traditional methods with modern equipment. How do different techniques work together on complex jobs?

media:content.media:title: Old School Meets New School
media:content.media:description: A towing and recovery job combining traditional methods with modern equipment. How do different techniques work together on complex jobs?

item.title: Sometimes You Drive It Yourself
item.description: A hands-on recovery situation where driving the vehicle is the most practical solution. What factors decide when that approach is best?

media:content.media:title: Sometimes You Drive It Yourself
media:content.media:description: A hands-on recovery situation where driving the vehicle is the most practical solution. What factors decide when that approach is best?

item.title: Driver Trapped in Cement Mixer
item.description: A dangerous situation unfolds when a driver is stuck inside a cement mixer. What steps turn this tense rescue around?

media:content.media:title: Driver Trapped in Cement Mixer
media:content.media:description: A dangerous situation unfolds when a driver is stuck inside a cement mixer. What steps turn this tense rescue around?

item.title: Firebird Recovery Mission
item.description: A classic Firebird faces trouble on the road. How is this vintage ride brought back to safety?

media:content.media:title: Firebird Recovery Mission
media:content.media:description: A classic Firebird faces trouble on the road. How is this vintage ride brought back to safety?

item.title: Heavy-Duty Recovery on Unstable Ground
item.description: Unstable terrain adds complexity to an already tough recovery job. How do professionals maintain control in these conditions?

media:content.media:title: Heavy-Duty Recovery on Unstable Ground
media:content.media:description: Unstable terrain adds complexity to an already tough recovery job. How do professionals maintain control in these conditions?

item.title: Truck Incident at a Bridge
item.description: A bridge becomes the scene of a tense recovery. How does Ron Pratt handle the risks of this tricky incident?

media:content.media:title: Truck Incident at a Bridge
media:content.media:description: A bridge becomes the scene of a tense recovery. How does Ron Pratt handle the risks of this tricky incident?
